text: The sun breaks the horizon, and the world is born again.
The storm is memory. Below them, the clouds are an ocean of gold.
Skyrith's wings beat once, twice, gathering the wind like an old friend.
Kale leans forward, her spirit soaring with his.
They are not the same rider and dragon who climbed in despair.
They have walked the forgotten path and returned.
The cure was not just in the stone, but in the journey itself.
A testament that even in the deepest cold, a spark can be kept alive.
And from that spark, a roaring fire can be reclaimed.
Their story continues, written not in ice, but in sky and flame.
